pr.title: Disable asciinema.org uploads and CLI E2E comment posting
pr.author: mitchdenny

failed_jobs.name: Tests / Hosting-1 / Hosting-1 (8-core-ubuntu-latest)
failed_jobs.reason: Test ParentProcessLifetimeScopesExecutableAndContainerToParentProcess failed due to DCP returning BadRequest with timestamp parsing error ('0001-01-01T00:02:47Z' cannot be parsed). PR only changed CI workflow YAML files, not hosting code.

failed_tests.reason: Root cause is DCP (k8s) returning HTTP 400 BadRequest due to timestamp parsing failure: 'parsing time "0001-01-01T00:02:47Z" as "2006-01-02T15:04:05.000000Z07:00": cannot parse "Z" as ".000000"'. This is an intermittent DCP infrastructure issue. The PR only changed CI workflow YAML files (.github/workflows/), not any hosting or DCP code.
